content.en:
Now.

Ye Tian was already a true Sevenfold Ancestor, and he had also condensed the Ninefold Life Dao Flower.

Moreover, his Ninefold Life Dao Flower is still the most perfect Ninefold Life Dao Flower, and when he hits the Eightfold Origin Ancestor Realm in the future, he can also condense the Ninefold Yuan Dao Flower.

In this way, the perfect foundation can be cast!

After a period of time, Ye Tian completely stabilized the realm of the early stage of the Sevenfold Ancestor.

Now, his strength has skyrocketed many times, and those Dao Ancestors at the peak of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor are estimated to be no match for him, but they should still not be able to beat the weaker half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor, after all, the gap in cultivation is too big, and it is difficult to cross it all at once.

Subsequently, Ye Tian tested the life level in the Guquan Xuanlou.

Soon, the test results came in.

【15.8】

The health level has been directly increased from 9.9 to 15.8, which is a huge increase!

"If I can raise my cultivation to the peak realm of the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, there is hope that my life level will be raised to more than 20!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course.

At the moment, there is no point in improving the level of life, and it is still mainly based on improving cultivation.

......

In the following days, Ye Tian used the resources on his body to improve his cultivation.

With the consumption of a large amount of resources, Ye Tian's cultivation is also slowly improving.

I have to say that the improvement of the cultivation of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor is very slow, even if there are enough resources, it is not realistic to quickly ascend to the peak realm of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor.

Ye Tian's potential was invincible, but he had no advantage in improving his cultivation, so he was similar to the other sevenfold ancestors of the Nine-Fold Building, and he could only slowly improve his cultivation.

He wanted to elevate his cultivation to the peak realm of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, and he couldn't do it without hundreds of billions of Origin Realm Eras.

Of course, if he obtains the kind of treasure that can quickly improve his cultivation, then he can reduce the time for his cultivation to improve.

The years passed, and in the blink of an eye, billions of primordial era years had passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's cultivation was still in the early stage of the Sevenfold Ancestor, but at least he had improved a lot, whether it was the Extreme Dao Will or the physical strength, he was much stronger than in the past.

However, he was still far from the mid-stage cultivation of the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor.

this day.

The truncated Black Mountain at the edge of the Hanhai region has changed, a large ancient nest has appeared here, and endless black fog has shrouded a large area, and even a small part of the boundary of the Hanhai region has been shrouded in black fog.

And this huge ancient nest is hidden in the black mist.

At first, the Dao Ancestors of the Hanhai District Boundary did not discover this place, but some Dao Ancestors would occasionally look for opportunities near the Truncated Black Mountain.

Thus, the ancient nest here was discovered.

Many Dao Ancestors tried to explore this ancient nest, but they fell inside one by one.

Suddenly, many Dao Ancestors were frightened and did not dare to enter one by one.

Subsequently, some half-step Yae Ancestors came here, only to find that this ancient nest had attracted a large number of primordial artifacts, and it was extremely difficult to enter this ancient nest.

However, after some fighting, several half-step Yae Ancestors still approached this large ancient nest.

However, they found themselves unable to enter the nest.

This ancient nest has a restriction that only Dao Ancestors from the peak of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor are allowed to enter at most.

As a result, the big forces in the Hanhai District Realm gathered a group of Sevenfold Ancestors and sent them into this ancient nest.

After all, such a huge ancient nest is located here, and it would not be good if it was left alone.

Moreover, a huge ancient nest is both a danger and an opportunity, maybe there are a lot of good things inside the ancient nest, and the value may exceed that of a special ancient nest like the No. 3 ancient nest!

However, after some time, a small number of Sevenfold Ancestors escaped.

And part of the information about this ancient nest has also been discovered, there are indeed a lot of good things in it, but it is also very dangerous, there are too many primordial antiquities comparable to the peak of the sevenfold original ancestor.

As a result, most of the Dao Ancestors fell inside.

If there weren't enough Sevenfold Primordial Ancestors entering it, they wouldn't be able to stop these Primordial Artifacts at all.

At first, the nest didn't cause much impact.

However, as time passed, the nest continued to expand.

This attracted the attention of the Hanhai Yellow Building, and the news was passed on to the upper floors of the Jiuju Building.

......

Hanhai District Boundary.

The high-level leaders of Hanhai Palace and other forces were all discussing here, and even sent many Sevenfold Peak Ancestors to sit in the vicinity of the Black Mountain and build bases to guard this place.

At this time, they no longer cared about the chance here, but were worried that this ancient nest would cause a terrible disaster to the Hanhai Realm.

After all, this ancient nest is constantly expanding and expanding, and how many times will it expand after a long time!

And the bigger the nest, the more terrifying the primordial artifacts will become!

At that time, how could the Dao Ancestor of the Hanhai District Realm be able to stop it!

Therefore, the Dao Ancestors of the Hanhai District Realm were all panicked, they had never seen anything like this!

Ancient Spring Xuanlou.

"The boundary of the Hanhai District is cut off from Black Mountain, where an expanding large ancient nest has appeared?"

Ye Tian was a little shocked.

The nest would expand, and he hadn't heard of it either.

However, the Nine-Story Building knew too many secrets, and Ye Tian knew what kind of ancient nest appeared in the Hanhai District boundary after a little checking.

"Growing Nest!"

According to Ye Tian's understanding, this kind of growth ancient nest is very valuable, but it is also a disaster.

If the growth of the Nest cannot be suppressed, the Nest will eventually destroy a large area and return to the Primordial Sea.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian consulted the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor and asked how to destroy this kind of growth-type ancient nest.

"The Eightfold Origin Ancestor can't destroy this kind of growth ancient nest, even if it attacks on the periphery, it can't help the ancient nest, at least the top half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor or Ninefold Origin Ancestor can smash this kind of ancient nest. But we can't make a move, once we do, it will trigger a terrifying existence in the primordial ancient sea, and I am afraid that it will lead to a war at that time. Once this kind of war breaks out, the Hanhai District Boundary will not be able to bear it at all, and it will be shattered. Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor said.

"Then you can only watch this ancient nest expand and expand?"

Ye Tian frowned.

"No, there is still a way to destroy this kind of growth ancient nest, but it can only rely on the Sevenfold Ancestors. "

"Send a large number of Sevenfold Primordial Ancestors into the Growing Ancient Lair and kill a large number of Primordial Artifacts. Then plant a special plant - Devouring Life Tree, this Devouring Life Tree is a special creature researched by the top powers, and it is also a plant researched with primordial antiquities, which can continuously absorb the origin of the growing ancient nest. However, once this Devouring Lifetree is planted, the Primordial Antiquities will attack wildly, and if they can't bear it, the Devouring Lifetree will naturally be destroyed. "

"But once resisted, Devouring the Lifetree will inhibit the growth of the growing nest, and eventually make the growth nest scrap and become an ordinary large nest. Even, the Devouring Life Tree will produce the Devouring Life Fruit, which helps to improve cultivation and life level, and has an effect on the Eightfold Ancestor and even us half-step Ninefold Ancestor, which can improve our life level. "

As soon as the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor said this, Ye Tian understood!

At this time, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor said again: "Any growth type ancient nest has some special resources inside, at present, the growth type ancient nest in the Hanhai District boundary has not yet spread, the Nine Layers Building will first send a group of sevenfold ancestors to enter there, you can also go in, maybe there will be an amazing harvest!"

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.
